  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AlertManager
    Monitors budget thresholds and sends notifications when spending milestones are reached.
    AmountRenderer
    Table cell renderer for the Amount column in the expense history table.
    App
    Central application controller and facade for the Mizan budget app.
    AppColors
    Centralised colour palette for the Mizan dark theme.
    AuthManager
    Manages PIN-based authentication and lockout logic for the application.
    BaseScreen
    Abstract base class for all application screens.
    BudgetCycle
    Represents a user-defined budget cycle with a fixed allowance and date range.
    Category
    Represents an expense category used to classify transactions.
    CategoryPillRenderer
    Table cell renderer that draws category names as rounded pill badges, with a consistent colour assigned to each category by index.
    CycleManager
    Handles the lifecycle of a BudgetCycle: creation, retrieval, status updates, and deletion.
    CycleStatus
    Enumerates the possible lifecycle states of a BudgetCycle.
    DashboardScreen
    Main dashboard screen showing spending summary, daily limit gauge, and a category breakdown pie chart.
    DatabaseHelper
    Singleton data-access object that manages all SQLite database operations for the Mizan budget application.
    DefaultDarkRenderer
    Default table cell renderer for text columns in the dark-themed expense table.
    Expense
    Represents a single expense transaction logged by the user.
    ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Screen that allows the user to log a new expense.
    ExpenseManager
    Coordinates expense and category operations, delegating persistence to DatabaseHelper and triggering budget alerts via AlertManager.
    GaugePanel
    Custom painted panel that renders a circular arc gauge showing today's spending progress against the daily limit.
    HistoryScreen
    Screen that displays the full expense history for the current cycle.
    LimitCalculator
    Calculates daily spending limits based on the remaining balance and remaining days in the active BudgetCycle.
    LockScreen
    Screen shown at startup when a PIN has been set.
    Main
    Application entry point for the Mizan budget management desktop app.
    SettingsScreen
    Settings screen with three sub-sections: Categories, Security, and Cycle.
    SetupScreen
    First-run screen where the user defines their budget cycle.
    UIFactory
    Factory class that creates pre-styled Swing components consistent with the Mizan dark theme.
